items.name_en: New Mini Size in Stock!!️
items.name_cn:
New Mini Size in Stock!!️
The 30 Montaigne Avenue Mini series is cute and refined, crafted from glossy calfskin. The rounded flap has a refined curve, featuring a vintage metal turn-lock clasp. It is paired with a classic chain of alternating gold-finish metal links and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. A perfect small bag for daily outings.
Size: 18*4.5*10cm
0323

items.name_en: New model 2091# Prada crossbody bag, two straps. Besides playful colors, the exposed iconic logo and unique weave are beautiful and unique. If you want beauty, personality, and elegance, this one satisfies it all. Dimensions: 23-19-9cm

items.name_en: New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
items.name_cn:
New Montaigne 30 Silver Clasp❤️ 'Killing Eve' Bag
A very cool silver clasp that gives me a 'Killing Eve' vibe!
I really like this square bag, it looks so classy when worn, giving a cool and capable feel!
Classic embroidered fabric with genuine leather, professional or casual outfits, both are easy to hold!
The chain is detachable.
Size 24*17*8

specs.rawTitle:

Size 24*17*8

items.name_en: 🆕 N00092 Blue! MULTIPLE Short wallet Multiple wallet crafted with Monogram canvas and Taïga leather to create a tonal effect, outlining simple lines. It contains multiple compartments and card slots to hold bank cards, receipts, and paper money, and can be easily placed in most pockets. Dimensions:12/9cm.

items.name_en: 🆕 N40748 Red Check! The 'zippie wallet' from the 'damiericious' series reinterprets damier canvas with charming colors. A special edition item, this iconic wallet features a slim silhouette and a round zipper closure, creating a fresh and feminine atmosphere with soft colors. The cleverly designed interior is divided into multiple compartments for bills, cards, and documents. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm
